Remote Access.message: Exposing administration services in containers is security-sensitive. Port commonly used for administration services (SSH:22, RDP:3389, Telnet:23, VNC:5900-5903, Database:3306/5432/27017, etc.) should not be exposed. These services may contain vulnerabilities or provide unauthorized access. Consider using secure alternatives or restricting access through network policies.

Port commonly used for administration services (SSH:22, RDP:3389, Telnet:23, VNC:5900-5903, Database:3306/5432/27017, etc.) should not be exposed. These services may contain vulnerabilities or provide unauthorized access. Consider using secure alternatives or restricting access through network policies.

summary.description: This rule detects when administration service ports are exposed in Docker containers, which increases security risks
summary.recommendation: Do not expose administration ports. Use secure alternatives or restrict access through network policies.
